---
title: "Predictive Modeling of Patient Risk Profiles"
author: "Piotr Banaś"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = TRUE,
	warning = TRUE
)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytuesdayR)

#dataset download
tidy_tuesday_dataset <- tt_load('2023-10-24')

data_frame <- tidy_tuesday_dataset$patient_risk_profiles

#data verification whether everything has loaded appropriately
dim(data_frame)
head(data_frame)
#ncol(data_frame)
#nrow(data_frame)
```
